name: veilpiercer
description: Per-step tracer for local LLM agent pipelines. Capture what each agent step reads vs produces, then diff two sessions to find exactly where they diverged.

tools.name: start_session
tools.description: Start a new VeilPiercer trace session. Returns a session_id to use in trace_step calls. Call this at the beginning of an agent run you want to trace.

session_id.description: Unique name for this session (e.g. 'run-a'). Auto-generated if omitted.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent or pipeline being traced.

tools.name: trace_step
tools.description: Log one step of an agent pipeline. Captures what the step received (prompt) and produced (response). Call after each agent step.

tools.name: diff_sessions
tools.description: Compare two trace sessions to find where they diverged. Returns fork step, last shared state, and side-by-side step comparison. Use this when two runs of the same pipeline produced different outputs.

session_b.description: session_id of the run to compare against.
